Y ama, Pancha tatva and Gulika let us move on to next section
on the application of these and other methods for birth time
rectification.

Birth Time Rectification
Methods
1. Pancha Tatva Method
The concept here is that "child would be born either in
Air tatva or Air Antara tatva only". In other words, "if BT is
in Air tatva or Air Antara tatva then the given BT can be
treated as correct (otherwise make necessary correction)".
As told earlier, the five tatvas are supposed to rise within
every yama. As per this concept, similar to Dasa-Antara dasa
system, the five tatvas should be considered to rise within
each tatva. Let us call it Antara tatva. The order of Antara
tatva rise within each tatva is given below -
Earth -Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Sky
Water -Water, Fire, Air, Sky, Earth
Fire - Fire, Air, Sky, Earth, Water
Air -Air, Sky, Earth, Water, Fire
Sky -Sky, Earth, Water, Fire, Air
Proportion between each An tara tatva is similar to as told
